candidates.title: Microsoft Unveils Wave 3 of Microsoft 365 Copilot with "Work IQ" and "Copilot Cowork"
candidates.description: Microsoft announced its strategy to make South Korea an AI hub and unveiled Wave 3 of Microsoft 365 Copilot, introducing "Work IQ" for personalized context and "Copilot Cowork" for multi-step task execution. This advancement aims to significantly enhance enterprise productivity and the integration of AI into daily work.
candidates.significance: Wave 3 of Microsoft 365 Copilot, with new features like "Work IQ" and "Copilot Cowork" for multi-step tasks, is expected to profoundly impact enterprise productivity and AI's role in workflows. Given Microsoft's market penetration, these developments will likely be highly relevant in 5+ years as AI becomes more deeply embedded in business operations.
